---
title: ""
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-header">
  <h1><i class="bi bi-life-preserver"></i> Help & Support</h1>
  <p>ECO 1000 · Principles of Economics · Fall 2026</p>
</div>
```

## Office Hours

The best way to get help is to come talk with me.

| | |
|---|---|
| **Location** | KoBC 118 |
| **Hours** | *[Add your office hours days and times]* |
| **Email** | [bsheridan4@elon.edu](mailto:bsheridan4@elon.edu) |

If you cannot make my regular office hours, email me and we'll find a time that works.

::: {.callout-note}
You don't need to have a specific question to come to office hours. Reviewing concepts, talking through your thinking, or just getting a feel for the material are all good reasons to stop by.
:::

---

## Tutoring & Academic Support

**Elon's Koenigsberger Learning Center (KLC)** offers free tutoring for many courses:

- **Website:** [elon.edu/klc](https://www.elon.edu/u/academics/koenigsberger-learning-center/)
- **Location:** Belk Library, Lower Level
- Peer tutors are available — check the KLC website for economics tutoring availability.

---

## Study Tips for Economics

1. **Keep up with the readings.** Economics concepts build on each other — falling behind makes catching up harder.
2. **Work through practice problems.** Reading about supply and demand is different from solving a problem yourself.
3. **Connect concepts to the real world.** When you hear something in the news, ask yourself how it relates to what we've covered in class.
4. **Form a study group.** Explaining concepts to others is one of the best ways to test your own understanding.
5. **Come to office hours early.** Don't wait until the night before an exam.

---

## Campus Resources

| Resource | Contact |
|---|---|
| Koenigsberger Learning Center | [elon.edu/klc](https://www.elon.edu/u/academics/koenigsberger-learning-center/) |
| Disabilities Resources | [elon.edu/disabilities](https://www.elon.edu/u/academics/koenigsberger-learning-center/disabilities-resources/) |
| Student Health & Counseling | [elon.edu/wellness](https://www.elon.edu/u/health-wellness/) |
| Elon Library | [elon.edu/library](https://www.elon.edu/u/library/) |
